page.title: Prayer Times & Qibla Compass — Islam
meta.description: Prayer times and Qibla direction based on your location
location.allowPrompt: Allow location access to see prayer times and Qibla direction for your area.
location.errorDefault: Unable to access your location. Please check your browser permissions and try again.
location.errorDeniedIos: Location access denied. To fix this on iOS: 1. Settings → Privacy & Security → Location Services → Enable Location Services 2. Scroll down to Safari → select 'While Using App' 3. Reload this page
location.errorUnavailable: Location unavailable. Please check your internet connection and GPS settings.
location.errorTimeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
prayer.heading: Prayer Times
qibla.heading: Qibla Compass
qibla.label: Qibla
qibla.calibrationGuide: Move your phone in a figure-8 pattern to calibrate the compass. This helps the device map the local magnetic field.
